title: 7 Herbal Teas For Itchy Eyes
description: Euphrasia officinalis teas contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help to reduce inflammation and calm irritated tissues in the eyes. This makes it a popular remedy for itchy eyes caused by allergies, dryness, or other irritants. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties work by blocking the release of histamine, a chemical that contributes to itching and swelling.
